question: When you are operating a visual line of sight inspection of a fire scene, you lose sight of your UA behind a plume of smoke, you should:

options.text: Immediately ascend to a height at which the aircraft reappears and abort the flight.
Regain VLOS as soon as possible and continue the flight.
Descend and land the aircraft immediately even though you cannot see it.
Initiate the return to home function of the aircraft.

classification_notes: Regain VLOS after smoke obscures the UA.
